display.purpose: Legacy landing surfaces only, pending the homepage redesign; never inside the app.

headline.purpose: Page-level headings in the app (Material h5).

body.purpose: The workhorse: tables, descriptions, prose (Material body2).

label.purpose: Buttons and control labels — uppercase Material button treatment.

caption.purpose: Fine print and compact readouts: the version row, keycap hints, helper lines.

overline.purpose: The chrome's section labels (the rail's 'Workspace'); a signpost step, never body text.

mono.purpose: Machine-exact identity: hashes, s3:// URIs, package handles, versions.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Floating controls that will leave: menus, popovers, the search suggestions (Material elevation 8).

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Dialogs — the strongest depth in the system (Material elevation 24).

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Panel and overlay transitions; motion conveys state, never decoration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one strong action on a surface — midnight fill, uppercase label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #19163b; color: #fff; font: 500 0.875rem/1.75 Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02857em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #100e28; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #19163b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Secondary actions — midnight label, hairline border, transparent ground.
components.css: .ds-btn-outlined { background: transparent; color: #19163b; font: 500 0.875rem/1.75 Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02857em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 5px 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(25,22,59,0.5); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-outlined:hover { background: rgba(25,22,59,0.06); border-color: #19163b; } .ds-btn-outlined:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #19163b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard Material text input — quiet at rest, primary-colored on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); } .ds-field-input { font: 400 0.875rem/1.43 Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); background: #fff; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.42); padding: 6px 0; transition: border-color 150ms; } .ds-field-input:hover { border-bottom-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); } .ds-field-input:focus { outline: none; border-bottom: 2px solid #19163b; margin-bottom: -1px; } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Metadata tags and filter tokens — standard Material chip.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: #e0e0e0; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); font: 400 0.8125rem/1 Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #d5d5d5; }

components.name: Card
components.description: The working surface — white, border-delineated, 4px corners.
components.html:
Quilt Example
s3://quilt-example · 80 packages · 356.9 GB
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-radius: 4px; padding: 16px; font-family: Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font: 500 1.25rem/1.6 Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); } .ds-card-body { font: 400 0.875rem/1.43 Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Navigation Rail (selected row)
components.description: The midnight chrome — selected row wears the wash plus the amber bracket (Indicator Rule); focus is an amber ring (Focus Ring Rule).
components.html: ▦Volumes⌕Search
components.css: .ds-rail { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; width: 256px; padding: 8px; background: #19163b; font-family: Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-rail-row { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-rail-row:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-rail-row--selected { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); color: #fff; font-weight: 500; } .ds-rail-row--selected::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 3px; background: #fb8c00; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; } .ds-rail-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fb8c00; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-rail-icon { width: 20px; text-align: center; opacity: 0.85; }

components.name: Search Band
components.description: The top bar is chrome, not a card: flat white band, hairline bottom, bordered field with a keycap hint.
components.css: .ds-band { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 64px; padding: 0 24px; background: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); font-family: Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-band-field { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; max-width: 720px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.38); border-radius: 4px; } .ds-band-field:focus-within { border: 2px solid #19163b; padding: 0 11px; } .ds-band-icon { color: rgba(0,0,0,0.38); } .ds-band-field:focus-within .ds-band-icon { color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); } .ds-band-input { flex: 1; border: none; outline: none; font: 400 0.875rem/1.43 Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); } .ds-band-input::placeholder { color: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); } .ds-band-kbd { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 20px; height: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.23); border-radius: 2px; font: 400 0.75rem/1 'Roboto Mono', monospace; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); } .ds-band-field:focus-within .ds-band-kbd { visibility: hidden; }

components.name: Data Identity
components.description: Machine-exact identity: mono face, exact value, copy affordance.
components.html: 3f7a9c…e41b
components.css: .ds-identity { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Roboto Mono', monospace; } .ds-identity-hash { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-identity-copy { background: none; border: none; padding: 2px; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.54); cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-identity-copy:hover { color: rgba(0,0,0,0.87); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-identity-copy:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #19163b; outline-offset: 1px; }

narrative.overview: The catalog is a well-calibrated instrument: quiet chrome, exact readouts, dense where precision demands it, and nothing on screen performs. Users are scientists and data engineers in the middle of a task — the interface earns trust the way an instrument does, through consistency, legibility, and exact values, never through decoration. The system has one register: the instrument — white working surfaces framed by midnight chrome. The former marketing/website register (coral, cobalt, gradients, dark hero grounds) is retired; bare moments (sign-in, terminal errors) wear a stripped variant of the same register, never a different one.
keyCharacteristics: Single-family typography (Roboto), with Roboto Mono reserved for machine-exact identity.
Midnight chrome around white working surfaces; one amber accent as the indicator.
Flat-leaning depth: borders and tonal separation first, shadows for true overlays only.
Standard Material affordances; density serves the task, calm serves everything else.

rules.name: The Indicator Rule
rules.body: Accents indicate — selection, state, attention. One selection vocabulary product-wide: the selected item wears the amber indicator (the rail's 3px bracket, a tab's underline) alongside its wash. An accent on ≤10% of any screen; an accent used as decoration is a defect. Amber is never a surface, a tint, or a fill.

rules.name: The One-Register Rule
rules.body: The product has one register: the instrument. No gradient CTAs, coral accents, hero typography, or marketing chrome anywhere — including sign-in, error pages, and anonymous surfaces, which wear the bare variant of the same register.

rules.name: The Focus Ring Rule
rules.body: Keyboard focus is never invisible: a 2px ring in the counter-color of the ground — Amber Indicator on midnight chrome, Midnight Chassis on light surfaces.

rules.name: The Mono Identity Rule
rules.body: Anything content-addressed or machine-exact — hashes, s3:// URIs, package handles, version ids — renders in Roboto Mono. Prose never does.

rules.name: The No-Display-Font Rule
rules.body: Display sizes and the 300 weight have no home in the app; nothing outranks a Headline. They linger only on legacy landing surfaces pending the homepage redesign.

rules.name: The Overlay-Only Rule
rules.body: A shadow means 'this floats above the plane and will leave.' If it doesn't leave, it doesn't get a shadow — it gets a border.

dos: Do keep the instrument quiet: white surfaces, midnight chrome, one accent indicating — the data is the loudest thing on screen.
Do use Roboto Mono for every hash, URI, handle, and version (the Mono Identity Rule).
Do delineate resting surfaces with borders and tone; save shadows for things that float (the Overlay-Only Rule).
Do use the same control vocabulary everywhere — a control means one thing on every screen.
Do show exact values: real counts, real timestamps, real sizes, with copy affordances.
Do give every interactive element a visible keyboard focus (the Focus Ring Rule).
donts: Don't let consumer-SaaS gloss into the app: no gradient CTAs, no hero metrics, no marketing chrome.
Don't drift toward cloud-console density: no wall-of-controls, no every-option-visible screens without hierarchy.
Don't regress toward legacy lab software: no beige chrome, no modal mazes, no dead affordances — anything styled as interactive must act.
Don't reintroduce the retired website palette — coral, cobalt, gradients (the One-Register Rule); there is one dark and it is the Midnight Chassis.
Don't signal state with color alone; pair color with text or iconography.
Don't use display sizes or the 300 weight inside the app.
